mapper.sql: id, user_id, blood_type, height, weight, chronic_disease, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, medical_history, drug_allergies, physical_examination, medical_records, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_record ( user_id, blood_type, height, weight, chronic_disease, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, medical_history, drug_allergies, physical_examination, medical_records, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{bloodType}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{chronicDisease}, #{emergencyContact}, #{emergencyPhone}, #{medicalHistory}, #{drugAllergies}, #{physicalExamination}, #{medicalRecords}, now(), now() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM health_record WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM health_record
AND user_id = #{userId} AND blood_type = #{bloodType} AND chronic_disease LIKE CONCAT('%', #{chronicDisease}, '%') AND emergency_contact LIKE CONCAT('%', #{emergencyContact}, '%') AND emergency_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{emergencyPhone}, '%')
ORDER BY update_time DESC

SELECT FROM health_record
AND user_id = #{healthRecord.userId} AND blood_type = #{healthRecord.bloodType} AND chronic_disease LIKE CONCAT('%', #{healthRecord.chronicDisease}, '%') AND emergency_contact LIKE CONCAT('%', #{healthRecord.emergencyContact}, '%') AND emergency_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{healthRecord.emergencyPhone}, '%')
ORDER BY update_time DESC
